title: Wild Little World
subtitle: A First Look at Animals and Where They Live

blurb: Step into a wild little world! From a red fox in a sunlit forest to fireflies glowing over a meadow at night, this gentle first nature book takes early readers on a tour of twenty animals and the beautiful places they call home. Soft, glowing watercolours and simple, read-aloud lines make every page a warm discovery — a perfect first nature adventure for curious little ones just beginning to read.
